title: Haunted Maze Walk
summary: Click open paths, follow footprints to the door, search dark areas for keys, and collect glowing pirate gold.
description: A local-only maze walk with a framed maze view, free click-to-move exploration, footprint clues to the locked door, dark areas that hide keys or cartoon monster jump-outs, glowing pirate gold on the path, and picture popups for treasure and hidden-key discoveries. No timers, no losing, and hints when you get lost.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview is useful if a kid is sensitive to spooky Halloween decorations or cartoon jump-outs.
safety.notes: Dark areas may reveal a hidden key or a cartoon vampire, witch, werewolf, or zombie jump-out, but they never block long-term progress. Glowing pirate gold is a separate bonus find. No timer pressure, losing, public posting, or open-ended communication.
